Meaning: where it was collected : TF (Terra firme habitat) or BF ('bas-fond' or in english seasonally flooded habitat)

habitat affiliation: Metradica project categorization into generalist species or specialist species of either habtiats : TF (Terra firme habitat) or BF ('bas-fond' or in english seasonally flooded habitat)

Habitat variable and Type variable combined : Metradica project categorization into generalist species collected in Terra firme habitat TFGeneralist, generalist species collected in seasonally flooded habitat BFGeneralist, specialist species collected in terra firme habitat TFTF, or specialist species collected in seasonally flooded habitat BFBF.
Midrib Vein length per leaf area  : Midrib length / LA (cm.cm-2)
Secundary vein length per leaf area : 2e length / LA (cm.cm-2)
Tertiary vein length per leaf area: ((2e+3e)/tertiary box area ) - 2VLA  (cm.cm-2)
Major vein length per leaf area aka major vein density : sum of Midrib VLA+ 2VLA+3VLA  (cm.cm-2)
Branch height where sample was collected
Crown postition where sample was collected
Leaf thickness for FTH Paracou only (µm)
Chlorophyll content  for FTH Paracou only (SPAD unit)
Leaf dry mass content  for FTH Paracou only : leaf dry weight divided by fresh weight (g.g-1)
Diameter at breast height  for FTH Paracou only
Topographic wetness index  for FTH Paracou only calculated using S. Schmitt R script
